distance_km.note: No reliable sources found for a 'Sun Valley Nordic Festival' with a 30km race; related events like Sun Valley Nordic Invitational have shorter distances (5-15km)[1] and Boulder Mountain Tour mentioned but no distance specified[4]

elevation_m.note: No sources provide elevation gain for this specific event

country.note: Sun Valley events are in Idaho, US[1][3][4], but no confirmation this applies to 'Sun Valley Nordic Festival'

region_state_province.note: Related Nordic events in Idaho[1][3][4], but unconfirmed for this event

discipline.note: Related events include both freestyle (skate) and classic[1][3], but no info on this specific festival

field_size.note: Boulder Mountain Tour (part of festival?) expects 800+ participants[4]; other events smaller and youth-focused[1][3]

founded.note: 2010 reference calls it 'second annual'[4]; no mention of 1982

official_website.note: No sources confirm https://www.svnordic.com; related sites are svsef.org[1][3] and sunvalleylife.com[4]

race_date.note: 2010 festival Jan 29-Feb 6[4]; other Nordic events mid-February (e.g., Quigley Nordic Cup Feb 14)[3], but unconfirmed match
